message:
feat: add ScalarBool support, expand AD gradient coverage, and generate durability proof artifacts

- Add ScalarBool variant to FixtureValue enum with matching conversion,
  comparison, rank, dtype, and shape fingerprint logic across lib.rs and
  multirank_conformance.rs
- Expand capture_legacy_fixtures.py with grad cases for 11 lax unary
  primitives (exp, log, sqrt, tanh, neg, square, reciprocal, tan, atan,
  sinh, cosh), multi-rank tensor ops (rank-2 unary/binary), comparison
  ops returning Bool (eq/ne/lt/le/gt/ge), and select with boolean cond
- Add helper functions (fixture_value_bool, fixture_value_tensor_f64/i64)
  and CaseBuilder.add_raw for pre-encoded fixture values
- Regenerate legacy_transform_cases.v1.json with ~2800 additional lines
  of new test vectors
- Update all durability sidecar/proof/scrub artifacts and E2E evidence
  with latest test run results
- Add new durability proof artifacts for coverage, crash, flake, golden,
  reliability, and 50+ E2E test suites

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
